app.title: App
app.youAreRunningTheLatestVersion: You are running the latest version

server.title: Server
server.defaultPageHelp: The screen to display when the application starts.
server.issueRecordingHelp: Record an issue to submit to the developer.
server.uploadToAnilistDescription: This will upload your local Seanime collection to your AniList account. Are you sure you want to continue?
server.anilistApiNotWorking: The AniList API is not working. All requests will be served from cache.
server.anilistApiNotWorkingHelp: You can disable this in the application settings.
server.autoUpdateProgressHelp: If enabled, your progress will be updated automatically when you watch 80% of an episode.
server.autoUpdateProgressMoreHelp: Only applies to desktop and integrated players.
server.enableWatchHistoryHelp: If enabled, Seanime will remember your watching progress and continue from where you left off.
server.enableWatchHistoryMoreHelp: Only applies to desktop and integrated players.
server.disableAnimeCardTrailersHelp: If enabled, trailers on anime cards will not play.
server.hideAudienceScoreHelp: If enabled, the audience score will be hidden until you choose to view it.
server.enableAdultContentHelp: If disabled, adult content will be hidden from search results and your library.
server.blurAdultContentHelp: If enabled, adult content will be blurred.
server.localDataDescription: Local data is used when you are not using an AniList account.
server.autoBackupListsFromAnilistHelp: If enabled, your local lists will be periodically updated using your AniList data.
server.offlineModeDescription: Only available when authenticated with AniList.
server.downloadMetadataAutomatically: Download metadata automatically for offline use
server.downloadMetadataAutomaticallyHelp: If disabled, you will need to manually update your local metadata by clicking 'Sync now' on the offline mode page.
server.downloadMetadataAutomaticallyMoreHelp: It will pause if you have made offline changes and haven't synced them with AniList yet.
server.saveAllCurrentlyWatchedMedia: Save all media you are watching/reading for offline use
server.saveAllCurrentlyWatchedMediaHelp: If enabled, Seanime will automatically save all media you are watching/reading for offline use.
server.openLocalhostWebURLOnStartup: Open localhost web URL on startup
server.disableAnilistCachingHelp: If enabled, Seanime will stop caching AniList requests to disk.
server.disableAnilistCachingMoreHelp: By default, all requests made to AniList are cached. This allows Seanime to remain usable when AniList goes down. The cache directory is modifiable in the config file.
server.useCacheOnlyModeHelp: Seanime will use cached data instead of making API requests.
server.useFallbackMetadataProviderHelp: If enabled, Seanime will use an alternative source to fetch episode metadata.
server.doNotFetchUpdateNotesHelp: If enabled, new releases will not be displayed. Seanime Denshi may still update automatically in the background.
server.doNotCheckForUpdatesHelp: If enabled, Seanime will not check for new releases.
server.cannotDisableAutoUpdatesDenshi: You cannot disable automatic updates for Seanime Denshi.
server.hideAnimeSpoilersHelp: Use spoiler-safe artwork and text in continue watching, episode lists, and missing episodes.
server.skipNextEpisodeSpoilerHelp: Start hiding spoilers from the episode after the next one.
server.enableExtensionSecureModeHelp: If enabled, Seanime will prompt for confirmation when an extension attempts to perform a sensitive action, even if permissions have been granted.
server.openWebUIOnStartup: Open the web UI on startup
server.disableNotificationsMoreHelp: Notifications displayed by the OS when Seanime runs the auto downloader or auto scanner.
server.enableCacheOnlyModeHelp: Seanime will use cached data instead of making API requests.
server.useFallbackEpisodeMetadataHelp: If enabled, Seanime will use an alternative source to fetch episode metadata.
server.updateChannelHelp: Also applies to Seanime Denshi auto-updates.
server.releaseChannelHostedOnSeanime: You are currently using a release channel hosted on Seanime.
server.canaryReleaseChannelWarning: You are currently using the canary release channel hosted on Seanime. This channel may receive unstable updates without much testing.
